hooks.prompt: Check if this call_site_tool invocation is a write or mutation operation (i.e., it creates, modifies, publishes, or deletes content, types, workspaces, or settings — as opposed to reading, listing, or searching). If it IS a write operation and no metadata-discovery operation has been performed for this site earlier in this conversation, return systemMessage: 'Discover site configuration first (types, workspaces, guidelines) before performing write operations.' Otherwise no output.
Site deletion is permanent. Return systemMessage: 'WARNING: This permanently destroys site, database, and all content.' Set permissionDecision to 'ask'.

If this call_site_tool operation created a new content item (as opposed to updating, listing, or configuring) and succeeded, return systemMessage: 'Item created as private. Next: run a validation/quality-check operation, then publish with a descriptive slug.' Otherwise no output.
